channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Advocates push for major probe as US boat strikes in Latin America kill 157
item.description: The Inter-American Commission on Human Rights is set to hold first hearing on US's alleged extrajudicial killings.

item.title: How will the war on Iran impact the US economy?
item.description: Outcomes depend on how quickly oil tankers can return to the Strait of Hormuz, experts said.

item.title: Does President Trump have an exit strategy for the war with Iran?
item.description: United States officials are issuing contradictory statements on the war's timeline and objectives.

item.title: Iran vows to make Trump pay for ‘grave miscalculation’ if US escalates war
item.description: Ali Larijani responds to US threat to hit Iran's power infrastructure, saying the 'whole region will go dark'.

item.title: How oil is at the center of the US-Israel war with Iran
item.description: As oil prices rise, the US, Israel and Iran seem ready to keep fighting no matter the costs.

item.title: Israel launches air attack on Beirut during live Al Jazeera broadcast
item.description: An Israeli air attack struck a building during a live Al Jazeera broadcast in a new "wave of attacks" on Hezbollah.

item.title: Israel attacks central Beirut in escalation of deadly assault on Lebanon
item.description: Israel targets centre of Lebanese capital in escalation of military campaign that has killed nearly 700 people.

item.title: Trump says not ‘appropriate’ for Iran to participate in the World Cup in US
item.description: US president, who won the FIFA Peace Prize says Iran would be welcome but should not come for its players' safety.

item.title: Iran’s president sets terms to end the war: Is an off-ramp in sight?
item.description: Iran is asking for 'reparations' and a guarantee that the US and Israel will not attack in the future.

item.title: US military ‘not ready’ to escort oil ships through Hormuz, official says
item.description: Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei says strait should remain closed as Donald Trump claims US benefits from high oil prices.
